summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of HomePujan landing page iteration 3. All 5 new refinements verified: (1) Deep Maroon footer, (2) Sacred Manuscript Step 2 SVG, (3) Havan Kund Step 3 SVG, (4) New premium service card images, (5) All CTAs changed to 'Request a Vedic Alignment Call' with Parchment Modal. 100% pass rate across 33 test cases.
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: openConsultModal() and submitConsultForm() functions are each defined TWICE in the <script> block (lines 1314-1325 duplicated at 1339-1351; lines 1327-1338 duplicated at 1353-1364). Both copies are identical so functionally harmless (second definition overwrites first), but should be deduplicated for code cleanliness.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 refinements from iteration 3 fully tested and passing. Static HTML at /app/frontend/public/landing.html. Key new features: Deep Maroon footer (#4A0E0E), Sacred Manuscript SVG (Step 2), Havan Kund+flame SVG (Step 3), premium Unsplash images for all 3 service cards, 'Request a Vedic Alignment Call' CTA everywhere, Parchment Modal (#modal-consult) with form that generates WhatsApp URL with 'Pranam' + 'Vedic Alignment Call' in message. Minor code issue: openConsultModal and submitConsultForm each defined twice (functionally harmless).
